data.title: Revise navi_MVP_Build_Spec.md to close deep-review findings

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified commit 27bba06 against the plan. All 8 high-severity findings closed and internally consistent: egress check wired into §3/§6.2(correct order: before execute)/§9/§10 + egress evals; SAP output single-valued markdown (no orphan FindingsResult/'schema'); research route dispatched §6.4; pricing config §4 coherent with §6.1; budget=stop-and-report (+truncated flag, no leftover 'abort'); agent_tools join §5 read by §6.2; RunContext defined §7 (cost_so_far_usd/scopes/max_cost_per_run match §6.1/§6.2); memory gate-only §6.7. Medium 9-15 + low items addressed/deferred-with-note. No scope expansion (read-only; no Agent SDK/server tools). Master design doc untouched (confirmed). §13 log, §11 milestones, §10 eval counts, route enum all consistent. Two cosmetic nits; applied one inline (commit follows): named cost_so_far_usd in §6.1 + made dual budget enforcement explicit. -> done.
